title: ToolTreaux 10k Gold Testing Kit, 7pc
description:
Safely test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 10k Gold Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the 10k gold testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with gold and precious metals

ToolTreaux 10k Gold Testing Kit, 7pc

Safely test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 10k Gold Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the 10k gold testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with gold and precious metals.

Key Features

  • 10K GOLD TESTING KIT: Safely test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 10k Gold Testing Safety Kit; kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the 10k gold testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests!
  • 10k GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is ideally used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item
  • HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content and purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Testing Stone Dimensions: 2 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Stone Weight: 0.01lbs; Bottle Dimensions: 3 x 1 x 1 inches; Bottle Weight: 0.04lbs; Bottle Material: Plastic; Solution Capacity: 0.5 ounces; Solution made in USA
  • NOTE: Keep out of reach of children; Use caution when opening and using; Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended; Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: H02JFH3913
  • UPC: 810058483850
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Medium

10k GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is ideally used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item

HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear; ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed before completing any testing

SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.
